title: Wire Hang Redux for 64-bit macOS
summary: I just uploaded a 64-bit macOS version of my 2004 game Wire Hang Redux that I had forgotten all about. So now you can play it on your 64-bit Mac. This version built using BlitzMax. I’ll try to build it for Apple Silicon some time this decade, but no promises! Read more about the game in the original blog post . Download: gingerbeardman.itch.io/wire-hang-red…
content:
I just uploaded a 64-bit macOS version of my 2004 game Wire Hang Redux that I had forgotten all about. So now you can play it on your 64-bit Mac. This version built using BlitzMax. I’ll try to build it for Apple Silicon some time this decade, but no promises!

Read more about the game in the original blog post.

Download: gingerbeardman.itch.io/wire-hang-redux
